zh.lifeSummary: 當Poncette de Traves於1095年1月25日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o特拉福斯時，她的父親Thibaud de Traves31歲，母親Alice Contreglise27歲。她於1113年與Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1156年5月20日享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Traves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Travis
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): from Old French and Middle English travers, also Middle English travas, travis, a word with several meanings. It may denote a toll paid for the right to cross a boundary or bridge, the surname perhaps being for someone who paid or collected such tolls. Alternatively, it may mean ‘crosswise, sideways’ or ‘dispute, disagreement’. The Old French word also had the sense ‘crossing, passage’, and it is more than likely that the surname is Norman in origin, for someone who lived at a crossing place or at a place so named (compare French Travers 3). The presence of the preposition ‘de’ (and perhaps also ‘le’) in early forms of the surname appears to indicate a topographic or habitational explanation, but the French preposition and definite article were sometimes added gratuitously to Norman surnames as a sign of their high social status. See also Travers 1.

en.lifeSummary: When Poncette de Traves was born on 25 January 1095, in Traves, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Thibaud de Traves, was 31 and her mother, Alice Contreglise, was 27. She married Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté in 1113. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 20 May 1156, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Poncette de Traves est née le 25 janvier 1095, à Traves, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Thibaud de Traves, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Contreglise, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté en 1113. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 mai 1156, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Poncette de Traves am 25. Januar 1095 in Traves, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thibaud de Traves 31 und ihre Mutter Alice Contreglise 27. Sie hat 1113 Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 20. Mai 1156 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Poncette de Traves è nata il il 25 gennaio 1095 nel Traves, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Thibaud de Traves, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alice Contreglise, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté nel 1113. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 20 maggio 1156, all'età di 61 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Poncette de Traves(이)가 1095년 1월 25일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 트레이브스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibaud de Traves(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Contreglise(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1113년 Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1156년 5월 20일 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.25 JAN 1095–20 MAY 1156: 25 de janeiro de 1095–20 de maio de 1156
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Poncette de Traves nasceu em 25 de janeiro de 1095, em Traves, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Thibaud de Traves, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Contreglise, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté em 1113. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 20 de maio de 1156, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Poncette de Traves родилась 25 января 1095 г. в местности травесь, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Thibaud de Traves было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Contreglise, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté в 1113 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 20 мая 1156 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.25 JAN 1095–20 MAY 1156: 25 de enero de 1095–20 de mayo de 1156
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Poncette de Traves nació el 25 de enero de 1095, en Traves, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Thibaud de Traves, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Contreglise, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté en 1113. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1156, a la edad de 61 años.
